treatment_information.treatment_response: Procedure was incomplete due to respiratory complications.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented for elective RFA of HCC.
Patient intubated; procedure completed without complications.
Post-procedure, patient transferred to MICU for ongoing management.
Patient transferred out of ICU to medical floor.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Weekly labs and follow-up in clinic.
patient_outcome.recovery_timeline: ICU stay allowed for breathing recovery; otherwise, time not specified.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Mental status clear and coherent; activity level independent.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Experienced respiratory deterioration during the RFA procedure.
